label: positive
description: Replicates the axios 0.27.2 supply-chain poisoning (axios-poisoning-2024). The package depends on the decoy 'plain-crypto-js' (a named_signature for the campaign) and ships rat_loader.js + inject.dll (payload_filenames for the campaign). Postinstall triggers L2-POST-001; the bundled native DLL triggers L2-BUND-001; the platform-specific persistence scripts trigger L2-SIDELOAD-001.
